mergeStrategy: All non-English locales use mergeWithEnglishBase(en, partial) in locales/<code>/index.ts so runtime strings match English keys; partial locale files supply translations where present.
repoErrors: Each locale has locales/<code>/repoErrors.ts (~48 lines). en/nb plus ar,so,ti,am,tr,pl,vi,zh,tl,fa,dar,ur,hi have dedicated translations (LQA recommended for am/ti and RTL locales).
prodAllowlist: Default en,nb via locale-policy.ts; set NEXT_PUBLIC_DASHBOARD_LOCALE_ALLOWLIST to comma-separated AppLocale codes to enforce parity for more languages in test:i18n
filesOver300LinesInDashboardSrc: Tracked by scripts/check-file-length.ts in CI; split oversized modules incrementally (see CI lint job).
